account_sid.description: Twilio Account SID. Used as the HTTP Basic auth username and to scope every account-relative resource path; never logged.

auth_token.description: Twilio Auth Token. Used only as the HTTP Basic auth password; never logged.

base_url.description: Twilio REST API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

add_on_result_sid.description: Twilio AddOnResult SID used by docs-derived detail streams.

address_sid.description: Twilio Address SID used by docs-derived nested streams.

assigned_add_on_sid.description: Twilio Assigned Add-on SID used by docs-derived nested streams.

call_sid.description: Twilio Call SID used by docs-derived nested streams.

conference_sid.description: Twilio Conference SID used by docs-derived nested streams.

connect_app_sid.description: Twilio Connect App SID used by docs-derived detail streams.

country_code.description: ISO country code used by available phone number streams.

credential_list_sid.description: Twilio SIP Credential List SID used by docs-derived nested streams.

domain_sid.description: Twilio SIP Domain SID used by docs-derived nested streams.

ip_access_control_list_sid.description: Twilio SIP IP Access Control List SID used by docs-derived nested streams.

message_sid.description: Twilio Message SID used by docs-derived media and feedback streams.

payload_sid.description: Twilio Add-on payload SID used by docs-derived payload-data streams.

queue_sid.description: Twilio Queue SID used by docs-derived queue member streams.

recording_sid.description: Twilio Recording SID used by docs-derived transcription streams.

reference_sid.description: Twilio recording reference SID used by docs-derived Add-on result streams.

resource_sid.description: Twilio resource SID used by assigned Add-on streams.

sid.description: Generic Twilio resource SID for docs-derived detail streams and account-level resources.
